events.headline: 'THERE'S NO HIDING PLACE ON A SHIP': THE SAILORS STRANDED NEAR IRAN
events.detail: Drones, cruise missiles and fighter jets have become a common sight for many sailors stranded on ships in the Gulf.

events.headline: IRAN WAR LIVE: TRUMP SAYS WAR GOING ‘WELL’ AS GULF UNDER WAVE OF ATTACKS
events.detail: Israeli strikes kill dozens more in Lebanon, including 5 children among nine people killed in attack on village of Arki.

events.headline: IRAN ENVOY SAYS TEHRAN WILL KEEP STRAIT OF HORMUZ OPEN
events.detail: Iran’s UN envoy Amir Saeid Iravani said Tehran will not close the Strait of Hormuz and remains committed to freedom.

events.headline: IRÁN MANTIENE SU OFENSIVA PARA EXTENDER EL CAOS EN LA ECONOMÍA GLOBAL
events.detail: El bloqueo del estrecho de Ormuz impacta en los mercados mientras Israel y Estados Unidos siguen lejos de los objetivos estratégicos que se habían marcado

events.headline: IRAN'S NEW SUPREME LEADER VOWS TO BLOCK STRAIT OF HORMUZ IN FIRST STATEMENT
events.detail: A message attributed to Mojtaba Khamenei also says Iran will continue targeting US bases in the region.

events.headline: EMIRATI MINISTER TELLS BBC IRAN MUST END STRIKES ON GULF
events.detail: The UAE says more than 1,800 drones and missiles have been projected at the country since the war began.
